spec.name: erag-setup
spec.description: Ubuntu VM for setting up eRAG

action_list.name: action_create
action_list.description: System action for creating an application

action_list.name: action_delete
action_list.description: System action for deleting an application. Deletes created VMs as well

action_list.name: action_start
action_list.description: System action for starting an application

action_list.name: action_stop
action_list.description: System action for stopping an application

action_list.name: action_restart
action_list.description: System action for restarting an application

attrs.script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

export APT_OPTS='DPkg::Options::="--force-confnew"'

# Wait for any apt locks to be free
wait_for_apt() {
  echo "Waiting for apt + cloud-init..."

  # Wait for cloud-init (very important on fresh VMs)
  if command -v cloud-init >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    sudo cloud-init status --wait
  fi

  # Wait for apt systemd services to finish
  while systemctl is-active --quiet apt-daily.service \
     || systemctl is-active --quiet apt-daily-upgrade.service; do
    echo "Waiting for apt systemd services..."
    sleep 2
  done

  # Final safety: wait for locks
  while sudo fuser /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend >/dev/null 2>&1 \
     || sudo fuser /var/lib/apt/lists/lock >/dev/null 2>&1 \
     || sudo fuser /var/cache/apt/archives/lock >/dev/null 2>&1; do
    echo "Waiting for apt locks..."
    sleep 2
  done
}

wait_for_apt

sudo apt-get -o $APT_OPTS -y update
sudo apt-get -o $APT_OPTS -y install ansible python3-venv

curl -sLS https://get.arkade.dev| sudo sh
sudo chown -R nutanix:nutanix /usr/local/bin/arkade

## install utils
arkade get \
kubectx \
kubens \
krew \
stern

## install yq
sudo wget https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64 -O /usr/bin/yq
sudo chown -R nutanix:nutanix /usr/bin/yq
sudo chmod +x /usr/bin/yq

## install k9s
curl -sS https://webinstall.dev/k9s | bash

## set path for arkade and krew kubectl plugin binaries
export PATH="$HOME/.arkade/bin/:$HOME/.krew/bin:$PATH"

echo "alias k=$(which kubectl)" >> $HOME/.bashrc
echo "alias kns=$(which kubens)" >> $HOME/.bashrc

export INGRESS_IP=@@{WL01_LB_IP_RANGE_ENDS}@@

cat <<EOF >> ~/.env
export PATH_TO_ERAG_KUBECFG="/home/nutanix/erag.conf"
export ERAG_VERSION=@@{ERAG_VERSION}@@
export FQDN="erag-${INGRESS_IP//./-}.sslip.nutanixdemo.com"
EOF

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

#scp nutanix@nai-boot.ntnxlab.local:~/.kube/config /home/nutanix/config
sshpass -p @@{NAI_VM_PW}@@ scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no nutanix@nai-boot.ntnxlab.local:~/erag.conf /home/nutanix/erag.conf


cat <<EOF >> ~/.env
export KUBECONFIG="/home/nutanix/erag.conf"
EOF

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

# Clone repo
git clone https://github.com/opea-project/Enterprise-RAG
cd Enterprise-RAG/deployment

# Configure ansible log path
grep -q "\[defaults\]" ansible.cfg && sed -i '/\[defaults\]/a log_path = ./ansible.log' ansible.cfg || echo -e "[defaults]\nlog_path = ./ansible.log" >> ansible.cfg

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

export PATH_TO_KUBECFG="/home/nutanix/.kube/config"
# this needs to be the end IP from load balancer pool in workload cluster, assuming LB pool has 2 IPs and the first one is for Traefik
export FQDN="erag-10-42-231-151.sslip.nutanixdemo.com"

cd $HOME/Enterprise-RAG/deployment
yq e '.kubeconfig = strenv(PATH_TO_KUBECFG)' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml
yq e '.FQDN = strenv(FQDN)' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml
yq e '.install_csi = "nfs"' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml
yq e '.ingress.service_type = "LoadBalancer"' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml
yq e '.balloons.enabled=false' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml
yq e '.registry="registry.nutanixdemo.com/bootcamps/intel-erag"' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml

# Check
yq .kubeconfig inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors
yq .FQDN inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors
yq .telemetry inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors
yq .install_csi inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors
yq .ingress inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors
yq e .registry inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

echo "Working dir: $PWD"
cd $HOME/Enterprise-RAG/deployment

VENV="$HOME/Enterprise-RAG/deployment/erag-venv"

if [ ! -d "$VENV" ]; then
 python3 -m venv "$VENV"
fi

$VENV/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip
$VENV/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

cd $HOME/Enterprise-RAG/deployment

/home/nutanix/Enterprise-RAG/deployment/erag-venv/bin/ansible-galaxy collection install -r requirements.yaml --upgrade

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

export LLM_MODEL_NAME="llama31-8b-hf"
export LLM_ENDPOINT="https://nai.tmelab.net/enterpriseai"
export LLM_API_KEY="ee5975c3-78b6-4538-81d3-a186157c526d"


cd $HOME/Enterprise-RAG/deployment
# Update config to point to the external endpoint configuration files
yq e '.pipelines[0].samplePath = "chatqa/reference-external-endpoint.yaml"' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml
yq e '.pipelines[0].resourcesPath = "chatqa/resources-reference-external-endpoint.yaml"' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml

#  Check
yq .pipelines[0] inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors

# Edit reference-external-endpoint.yaml
yq e '(.spec.nodes.root.steps[] | select(.name == "Llm")).internalService.config |= ( 
.endpoint = "/v1/chat/completions" |
.LLM_MODEL_SERVER = "vllm" |
.LLM_MODEL_NAME = strenv(LLM_MODEL_NAME) | 
.LLM_MODEL_SERVER_ENDPOINT = strenv(LLM_ENDPOINT) |
.LLM_VLLM_API_KEY = strenv(LLM_API_KEY)
)' -i pipelines/chatqa/reference-external-endpoint.yaml

# Check

yq '.spec.nodes.root.steps[] | select(.name == "Llm")' pipelines/chatqa/reference-external-endpoint.yaml --no-colors

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

# Download certs
export CERT_PATH="$HOME/certs/fullchain1.pem"
export KEY_PATH="$HOME/certs/privkey1.pem"
mkdir -p $HOME/certs
wget -O $CERT_PATH http://10.55.251.38/workshop_staging/tradeshows/configuration/certificates/sslip.nutanixdemo.com/fullchain1.pem 
wget -O $KEY_PATH http://10.55.251.38/workshop_staging/tradeshows/configuration/certificates/sslip.nutanixdemo.com/privkey1.pem


# Update config with certs
cd $HOME/Enterprise-RAG/deployment
yq e '.certs.autoGenerated=false' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml
yq e '.certs.pathToCert=strenv(CERT_PATH)' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml
yq e '.certs.pathToKey=strenv(KEY_PATH)' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml

# Check
yq e .certs inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

source ~/.env

cd $HOME/Enterprise-RAG/deployment
kubectl patch storageclass nutanix-files -p '{"metadata": {"annotations":{"storageclass.kubernetes.io/is-default-class":"true"}}}'
kubectl patch storageclass nutanix-volume -p '{"metadata": {"annotations":{"storageclass.kubernetes.io/is-default-class":"false"}}}'

yq e '.gmc.pvc.accessMode = "ReadWriteMany"' -i inventory/sample/config.yaml

yq .install_csi inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors
yq .gmc inventory/sample/config.yaml --no-colors

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

cd $HOME/Enterprise-RAG/deployment

/home/nutanix/Enterprise-RAG/deployment/erag-venv/bin/ansible-playbook -u $USER playbooks/application.yaml --tags configure,install -e @./inventory/sample/config.yaml

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

source ~/.env

if [[ @@{ERAG}@@ != "true" ]]; then
    echo "eRAG marked False or unset, skipping"
    exit 0
fi

# --- Variables ---
REPO_DIR="$HOME/Enterprise-RAG"
DEPLOY_DIR="$REPO_DIR/deployment"
VENV="$DEPLOY_DIR/erag-venv"
CONFIG_FILE="inventory/sample/config.yaml"
SOLUTION_CONFIG_FILE="roles/application/pre_install/tasks/solution_config.yaml"

# --- Functions ---

clone_erag_repo() {
    echo "--- Cloning eRAG Repo ---"
    if [ ! -d "$REPO_DIR" ]; then
        git clone --branch $ERAG_VERSION --depth 1 https://github.com/opea-project/Enterprise-RAG "$REPO_DIR" 
    else
        echo "Repo already exists, skipping clone."
    fi
}

configure_ansible_log() {
    echo "--- Configuring ansible log path ---"
    cd "$DEPLOY_DIR"
    grep -q "\[defaults\]" ansible.cfg && \
        sed -i '/\[defaults\]/a log_path = ./ansible.log' ansible.cfg || \
        echo -e "[defaults]\nlog_path = ./ansible.log" >> ansible.cfg
}

configure_config_yaml() {
    echo "--- Configuring config.yaml ---"

    cd "$DEPLOY_DIR"
    yq e '.kubeconfig = strenv(PATH_TO_ERAG_KUBECFG)' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e '.FQDN = strenv(FQDN)' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e '.install_csi = "nfs"' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e '.ingress.service_type = "LoadBalancer"' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e '.balloons.enabled = false' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e '.registry = "registry.nutanixdemo.com/bootcamps/intel-erag"' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"

    # Validation
    yq e '.kubeconfig, .FQDN, .telemetry, .install_csi, .ingress, .registry' "$CONFIG_FILE" --no-colors
}

configure_domain_names() {
    echo "--- Configuring domain name prefixes in solution_config.yaml ---"

    cd "$DEPLOY_DIR"	
    yq -e "(.[] | select(.name == \"Set facts for domain names if not defined\") | .\"ansible.builtin.set_fact\") |=
      with_entries(
        .value |= (
          sub(\"'domainName': 'auth.'\"; \"'domainName': 'auth-'\") |
          sub(\"'domainName': 'grafana.'\"; \"'domainName': 'grafana-'\") |
          sub(\"'domainName': 'minio.'\"; \"'domainName': 'minio-'\") |
          sub(\"'apiDomainName': 's3.'\"; \"'apiDomainName': 's3-'\")
        )
      )" -i "$SOLUTION_CONFIG_FILE"
}

configure_venv() {
    echo "--- Configuring VENV ---"
    if [ ! -d "$VENV" ]; then
        python3 -m venv "$VENV"
    fi
    "$VENV/bin/python" -m pip install --upgrade pip
    "$VENV/bin/pip" install -r "$DEPLOY_DIR/requirements.txt"
}

install_ansible_collection() {
    echo "--- Installing Ansible collection ---"
    "$VENV/bin/ansible-galaxy" collection install -r "$DEPLOY_DIR/requirements.yaml" --upgrade
}

configure_llm_endpoint() {
    echo "--- Configuring LLM endpoint ---"
    export LLM_MODEL_NAME="llama31-8b-hf"
    export LLM_ENDPOINT="https://nai.tmelab.net/enterpriseai"
    export LLM_API_KEY="ee5975c3-78b6-4538-81d3-a186157c526d"

    cd "$DEPLOY_DIR"
    yq e '.pipelines[0].samplePath = "chatqa/reference-external-endpoint.yaml"' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e '.pipelines[0].resourcesPath = "chatqa/resources-reference-external-endpoint.yaml"' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"

    yq e '(.spec.nodes.root.steps[] | select(.name == "Llm")).internalService.config |= ( 
        .endpoint = "/v1/chat/completions" |
        .LLM_MODEL_SERVER = "vllm" |
        .LLM_MODEL_NAME = strenv(LLM_MODEL_NAME) | 
        .LLM_MODEL_SERVER_ENDPOINT = strenv(LLM_ENDPOINT) |
        .LLM_VLLM_API_KEY = strenv(LLM_API_KEY)
    )' -i "pipelines/chatqa/reference-external-endpoint.yaml"

    yq '.spec.nodes.root.steps[] | select(.name == "Llm")' "pipelines/chatqa/reference-external-endpoint.yaml" --no-colors
}

adding_certs() {
    echo "--- Adding certs ---"
    export CERT_PATH="$HOME/certs/fullchain1.pem"
    export KEY_PATH="$HOME/certs/privkey1.pem"
    
    mkdir -p "$HOME/certs"
    wget -qO "$CERT_PATH" http://10.55.251.38/workshop_staging/tradeshows/configuration/certificates/sslip.nutanixdemo.com/fullchain1.pem 
    wget -qO "$KEY_PATH" http://10.55.251.38/workshop_staging/tradeshows/configuration/certificates/sslip.nutanixdemo.com/privkey1.pem

    cd "$DEPLOY_DIR"
    yq e '.certs.autoGenerated = false' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e '.certs.pathToCert = strenv(CERT_PATH)' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e '.certs.pathToKey = strenv(KEY_PATH)' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e .certs "$CONFIG_FILE" --no-colors
}

configure_storage() {
    echo "--- Configuring storage ---"
    kubectl patch storageclass nutanix-files -p '{"metadata": {"annotations":{"storageclass.kubernetes.io/is-default-class":"true"}}}'
    kubectl patch storageclass nutanix-volume -p '{"metadata": {"annotations":{"storageclass.kubernetes.io/is-default-class":"false"}}}'

    cd "$DEPLOY_DIR"
    yq e '.gmc.pvc.accessMode = "ReadWriteMany"' -i "$CONFIG_FILE"
    yq e '.install_csi, .gmc' "$CONFIG_FILE" --no-colors
}

install_erag() {
    echo "--- Installing erag ---"
    cd "$DEPLOY_DIR"
    "$VENV/bin/ansible-playbook" -u "$USER" playbooks/application.yaml \
        --tags configure,install \
        -e "@./$CONFIG_FILE"
}

# --- Main Logic ---

echo "Starting eRAG installation process..."

clone_erag_repo
configure_ansible_log
configure_config_yaml
configure_domain_names
configure_venv
install_ansible_collection
configure_llm_endpoint
adding_certs
configure_storage
install_erag

echo "Installation Complete!"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

if [[ @@{ERAG}@@ != "true" ]]; then
    echo "eRAG marked False or unset, skipping"
    exit 0
fi

echo "Starting eRAG installation process..."

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

source ~/.env

if [[ @@{ERAG}@@ != "true" ]]; then
    echo "eRAG marked False or unset, skipping"
    exit 0
fi

# --- Variables ---
REPO_DIR="$HOME/Enterprise-RAG"
DEPLOY_DIR="$REPO_DIR/deployment"
VENV="$DEPLOY_DIR/erag-venv"
CONFIG_FILE="inventory/sample/config.yaml"

uninstall_erag() {
    echo "--- Installing erag ---"
    cd "$DEPLOY_DIR"
    "$VENV/bin/ansible-playbook" -u "$USER" playbooks/application.yaml \
        --tags uninstall \
        -e "@./$CONFIG_FILE"        
}

echo "Starting eRAG uninstallation process..."

uninstall_erag

echo "Uninstall Complete!"

cloud_init.user_data:
#cloud-config
users:
  - name: @@{CRED_SSH.username}@@
    lock_passwd: false
    shell: /bin/bash
    sudo: ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
    groups: [sudo, admin, docker]
    ssh_authorized_keys:
      - @@{CRED_SSH.public_key}@@

ssh_pwauth: false

package_update: true
package_upgrade: false

packages:
  - ca-certificates
  - curl
  - gnupg
  - lsb-release
  - apt-transport-https
  - software-properties-common
  - python3-pip

write_files:
  - path: /usr/local/bin/bootstrap.sh
    permissions: "0755"
    content: |
      #!/usr/bin/env bash
      set -euo pipefail
      APT_OPTS='-o Dpkg::Options::=--force-confnew'
      APT_FLAGS='-y --allow-change-held-packages'
      echo "Waiting for apt to be ready..."
      # Wait for apt locks (cloud-init already running, so no need for cloud-init wait)
      while fuser /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend >/dev/null 2>&1 \
         || fuser /var/lib/apt/lists/lock >/dev/null 2>&1 \
         || fuser /var/cache/apt/archives/lock >/dev/null 2>&1; do
        sleep 2
      done
      export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
      # Docker repo
      install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings
      curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg \
        | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg
      chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg
      echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] \
      https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $(lsb_release -cs) stable" \
      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list
      apt-get $APT_OPTS $APT_FLAGS -y update
      apt-get $APT_OPTS $APT_FLAGS install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin ansible python3-venv sshpass
      systemctl enable docker
      systemctl start docker
      # Remove any existing Kubernetes repo definitions
      grep -rl "pkgs.k8s.io" /etc/apt/ | xargs -r rm -f
      
      install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings
      curl -fsSL https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.34/deb/Release.key | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg
      echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg] https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.34/deb/ /" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list
      apt-get $APT_OPTS $APT_FLAGS -y update
      apt-get $APT_OPTS $APT_FLAGS install -y kubectl 
      # Helm
      curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/main/scripts/get-helm-3 | bash
      # Python deps - errors out with error: externally-managed-environment
      # pip3 install --no-cache-dir python-dotenv boto3

runcmd:
  - /usr/local/bin/bootstrap.sh
